title: Advertiser Industry
description: Standardized advertiser industry classification. Top-level categories classify the advertiser's primary business. Dot-notation subcategories (e.g., 'media_entertainment.podcasts') provide platform-specific precision where needed. Sellers map these to platform-native codes (Spotify ADV categories, LinkedIn industry IDs, IAB Content Taxonomy, etc.). Sellers MUST accept unknown values gracefully — treat unrecognized values as the parent category (strip the subcategory) or as uncategorized. This ensures forward compatibility as the taxonomy evolves.

enumDescriptions.automotive: Automotive manufacturers, dealerships, and auto industry
enumDescriptions.automotive.electric_vehicles: Electric vehicle manufacturers and charging infrastructure
enumDescriptions.automotive.parts_accessories: Auto parts, accessories, and aftermarket products
enumDescriptions.beauty_cosmetics: Beauty, cosmetics, and prestige skincare brands. Distinct from cpg.personal_care — use beauty_cosmetics for brands whose identity is rooted in beauty (L'Oreal Paris, Estee Lauder, Sephora) and cpg.personal_care for mass-market personal hygiene (Dove, Colgate)
enumDescriptions.cannabis: Cannabis products and dispensaries. Subject to heavy platform restrictions — most platforms require explicit category declaration for ad acceptance
enumDescriptions.cpg: Consumer packaged goods — mass-market products sold through retail. For food and beverage manufacturers, use food_beverage. For prestige beauty, use beauty_cosmetics
enumDescriptions.cpg.personal_care: Mass-market personal care and hygiene products (deodorant, toothpaste, soap). For prestige beauty brands, use beauty_cosmetics
enumDescriptions.dating: Dating apps and matchmaking services. Subject to platform restrictions similar to gambling_betting
enumDescriptions.education.online_learning: Online courses, MOOCs, and digital education platforms
enumDescriptions.energy_utilities.renewable: Renewable energy, solar, wind, and clean technology
enumDescriptions.finance.cryptocurrency: Cryptocurrency exchanges and blockchain financial products
enumDescriptions.food_beverage: Food and beverage companies — manufacturers (Coca-Cola, Nestle), restaurants, and alcohol brands. For non-food packaged goods, use cpg
enumDescriptions.food_beverage.alcohol: Alcoholic beverages (beer, wine, spirits). Subject to platform age-gating and regional restrictions
enumDescriptions.food_beverage.restaurants: Restaurants, fast food, and food delivery
enumDescriptions.gambling_betting: Gambling, sports betting, and wagering. Subject to heavy platform restrictions — most platforms require explicit category declaration
enumDescriptions.gambling_betting.sports_betting: Sports betting and daily fantasy sports
enumDescriptions.government_nonprofit.political: Political advertising and advocacy. Subject to platform transparency and disclosure requirements
enumDescriptions.healthcare.pharmaceutical: Pharmaceutical and biotech companies. Subject to platform restrictions on drug advertising
enumDescriptions.media_entertainment.film_tv: Film studios, TV networks, and streaming services
enumDescriptions.media_entertainment.publishing: Book publishers, magazines, and digital publications
enumDescriptions.pets: Pet food, supplies, and veterinary services
enumDescriptions.real_estate.commercial: Commercial real estate and property management
enumDescriptions.recruitment_hr: Job boards, staffing agencies, and HR technology
enumDescriptions.technology.ai_ml: Artificial intelligence and machine learning companies
